sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.content: Markenkern AG assumes no liability for the correctness, accuracy, timeliness, reliability, or completeness of the information provided on this website and in the app.

Medical Notice: AuDHD-Flow is not a medical product and does not replace medical or therapeutic treatment. The app is designed for self-regulation and everyday support. For health concerns, please consult a medical professional.
Claims for damages of a material or immaterial nature arising from access to or use or non-use of the published information are excluded.

sections.heading: Liability for Links
sections.content: References and links to third-party websites are outside our area of responsibility. Any responsibility for such websites is rejected. Access is at your own risk.
